name: teaching
description: Run adaptive, research-backed private tutoring workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Adaptive private tutoring with Teach Loop.
interface.longDescription: Teach Loop creates durable local learning workspaces with researched lessons, interactive exercises, learner evidence, and adaptive follow-up.
defaultPrompt: Help me start learning a new subject.
Create the next interactive lesson for me.
